title: 21 Editing an Outgoing Wire
body_text:
21	Editing an Outgoing Wire
21.1	Overview of Editing Outgoing Wires
You can edit an outgoing wire prior to approval if you detect an error (e.g., a spelling error in the senderГўВҖВҷs name).
Note: 	You canГўВҖВҷt edit the following fields: Sending Financial Institution, Beneficiary Financial Institution, Amount, Currency, or Fees. If you need to edit these fields, cancel the wire and create a new one.
The following users can edit an outgoing wire:
The user who creates the wire
ГўВҖВ“ The user can be edit the wire until itГўВҖВҷs fully approved. If the wire requires two approvals, the user can be edit the wire prior to the second user approving the wire.
Users authorized to approve wires
(i.e., users with the MTS ГўВҖВңAuthorize Outgoing TransfersГўВҖВқ permission). After the user edits a wire, only they and the creator of the wire can edit the wire again. Users canГўВҖВҷt approve a wire that they edit.
21.2	Editing Outgoing Wires
To edit an outgoing wire:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Pending Outgoing
or
Submitted Wires
, as appropriate. See Figure 1.
ГўВҲВ’
If you have permission to approve wires, select
Pending Outgoing
. Two-step authentication is required.
ГўВҲВ’
If you created the wire, select
Submitted Wires
. Two-step authentication isnГўВҖВҷt required.
Figure 1: Select ГўВҖВңPending Outgoing or Submitted Wires as AppropriateГўВҖВқ
Enter the code from your 2-Step Security Token if required, then select
Done
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Entering a 2-Step Security Code
Select the reference number of the wire to edit. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Select a Wire to Edit
Select
Edit Wire
, then select
Yes
. See Figure 4.
Note:	If you donГўВҖВҷt see the ГўВҖВңEdit WireГўВҖВқ option, you canГўВҖВҷt edit the wire.
Figure 4: Select ГўВҖВңEdit WireГўВҖВқ
Review and edit the wire as appropriate. You can edit the Sender, Beneficiary, Payment Details, Sender FI to Receiver FI Information, and Regulatory information fields.
Note: 	You canГўВҖВҷt edit the Sender FI Details, Receiver FI Details, Intermediary, Amount, Currency, or Fees fields. If you need to edit these fields, cancel the wire and create a new one.
Select
Next
to proceed. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select ГўВҖВңNextГўВҖВқ
Review the Update Regular Wire Transfer ГўВҖВ“ Confirmation page. Select
Print Confirmation
to print an updated wire confirmation if required. Select
Update Wire Transfer
to proceed with the edit. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Update Wire Confirmation Page
Select
Print Receipt
to print an updated receipt for the sender. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Print Receipt
Note:
The Transaction Information section displays the date and time of the most recent edit and the user ID of the individual who made the change. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Last Edited Information
END
